name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for GuessMyPlace
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## 💡 Why This Feature?
<!-- Explain the problem this feature would solve or the value it would add -->

## 📝 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockup (Optional)
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or visual references -->

## 🔧 Technical Considerations
<!-- Any technical details, dependencies, or implementation notes -->

## 📊 Impact
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Data/Questions
- [ ] Algorithm
- [ ] Documentation

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Would improve experience
- [ ] High - Critical for usability
- [ ] Critical - Blocking issue

## ✨ Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? -->

## 📎 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, examples, or references about the feature request -->
